name: aliexpress-delivery-tracker
description: Search Gmail for AliExpress delivery updates, consolidate by package number, summarize, send summary, mark as read, and move to shopping folder
user_prompt: I would like you to search my gmail and pull mails from AliExpress with delivery updates and consolidate the delivery update based on the package number, and create a summary table with the package number, list of products in that package and a summary of the update. send me that summary table and mark all those mails as read, then move all those update emails to "shopping" in gmail.

clarification_hints.criteria: Filter by sender addresses containing aliexpress.com and subject lines containing delivery, shipping, or tracking
clarification_hints.send: Send it to my own email address
